visual_gate.decision: Do not proceed to Mini Cubism diagnostic preview yet.

notes: Front-facing upper-body source with visible eyes, mouth, hair, neck, shoulders, and torso.
Hair and face regions are readable for Cubism planning.
Outfit/body emphasis may require user preference review before production promotion.

findings.reason: The generated clean face removes baked eyes and mouth, but it is still a generated full-face candidate and needs human style/identity review.
Open eye candidates are present for both left and right eyes; they still need overlay QA for anchor/scale before production layer expansion.
Clean socket and underpaint candidates pass alpha/size checks but look like isolated skin patches; they may create visible rectangular or oval stains when composited.
Half-closed states intentionally include visible iris/eye white, but alignment and symmetry need overlay QA.
Closed states do not show obvious iris/pupil/eye-white leakage in the contact sheet.
Mouth states are coherent as technical candidates, but mouth_base_clean and detail crops still have strong skin-patch boundaries and need compositing QA.
Mouth inner, teeth, and tongue are present as separate candidates but need anchor and scale overlay review.

recommended_next_actions: Build an overlay QA sheet on top of source_front to check eye/mouth anchors and patch visibility.
Regenerate or edit clean sockets, closed underpaint, and mouth_base_clean if overlay QA shows visible stains.
Ask 주인님 to review the source_front style and outfit before expanding to 64-part production layers.
